Headline: Green Line Delays
ShortDescription: Green Line trains are running with residual delays following an earlier obstruction near 43rd. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green Line trains are running with residual delays following an earlier obstruction near 43rd. 

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
